name: dubspace
description: Shared dub-mix sound space demo objects.

classes.description: Base class for addressable controls in a sound surface.
Control class for a loaded loop slot.

verbs.name: on_say_to
verbs.source: verb :on_say_to(text) rxd { let raw = str_trim(to_string(text)); if (!raw) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "filter expects a number (Hz)" }; } let requested = to_int(raw); if (requested == 0 && raw != "0") { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "filter expects digits", value: raw }; } let value = requested; if (value < 20) { value = 20; } if (value > 20000) { value = 20000; } this.cutoff = to_float(value); let msg = "Filter cutoff set to " + to_string(value) + " Hz."; if (value != requested) { msg = "Filter cutoff clamped to " + to_string(value) + " Hz (from " + to_string(requested) + ")."; } tell(actor, msg); observe({ type: "control_changed", target: this, name: "cutoff", value: this.cutoff, actor: actor, ts: now() }); return this.cutoff; }

classes.description: Control class for a small step-sequenced percussion loop.
Base class for shared dub-mix spaces.

verbs.name: enter
verbs.source: verb :enter() rxd { moveto(actor, this); if (!(actor in this.operators)) { this.operators = this.operators + [actor]; } let text = actor.name + " steps up to " + this.name + "."; observe({ type: "dubspace_entered", actor: actor, space: this, text: text, ts: now() }); if (this.mount_room != null) { observe_to_space(this.mount_room, { type: "dubspace_activity", source: this.mount_room, actor: actor, space: this, text: text, ts: now() }); } return { room: this, operators: this.operators, present_actors: this.subscribers, here_request: true, look_deferred: true }; }

verbs.name: leave
verbs.source: verb :leave() rxd { let dest = actor.home; if (this.mount_room != null) { dest = this.mount_room; } if (dest == null) { dest = $nowhere; } moveto(actor, dest); let next = []; for item in this.operators { if (item != actor) { next = next + [item]; } } this.operators = next; let text = actor.name + " steps away from " + this.name + "."; observe({ type: "dubspace_left", actor: actor, space: this, text: text, ts: now() }); if (this.mount_room != null) { observe_to_space(this.mount_room, { type: "dubspace_activity", source: this.mount_room, actor: actor, space: this, text: text, ts: now() }); } return { room: dest, operators: this.operators, here_request: true, look_deferred: true }; }

verbs.name: set_control
verbs.source: verb :set_control(target, name, value) rx { let allowed = ["loop_id", "playing", "gain", "freq", "send", "time", "feedback", "wet", "cutoff"]; if (!(target in contents(this)) || !(name in allowed)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "control is not writable through this dubspace", value: { target: target, name: name } }; } target.(name) = value; observe({ type: "control_changed", target: target, name: name, value: value }); return value; }

verbs.name: preview_control
verbs.source: verb :preview_control(target, name, value) rxd { observe({ type: "gesture_progress", actor: actor, target: target, name: name, value: value, sent_at: now() }); return value; }

verbs.name: cursor
verbs.source: verb :cursor(x, y) rxd { if (typeof(x) != "number" || typeof(y) != "number") { raise { code: "E_TYPE", message: "cursor coordinates must be numeric" }; } observe({ type: "cursor", actor: actor, x: x, y: y, sent_at: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: start_loop
verbs.source: verb :start_loop(slot) rx { if (!(slot in contents(this))) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "loop slot is not in this dubspace", value: slot }; } slot.playing = true; observe({ type: "loop_started", slot: slot, loop_id: slot.loop_id }); return true; }

verbs.name: stop_loop
verbs.source: verb :stop_loop(slot) rx { if (!(slot in contents(this))) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "loop slot is not in this dubspace", value: slot }; } slot.playing = false; observe({ type: "loop_stopped", slot: slot }); return true; }

verbs.name: set_drum_step
verbs.source: verb :set_drum_step(voice, step, enabled) rx { let voices = ["kick", "snare", "hat", "tone"]; if (!(voice in voices)) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "unknown drum voice", value: voice }; } if (typeof(enabled) != "boolean") { raise { code: "E_TYPE", message: "enabled must be boolean", value: enabled }; } let pattern = "drum_1".pattern; let row = pattern[voice]; if (step < 0 || step >= length(row)) { raise { code: "E_RANGE", message: "drum step out of range", value: step }; } let next = []; let i = 0; for item in row { if (i == step) { next = next + [enabled]; } else { next = next + [item]; } i = i + 1; } pattern[voice] = next; "drum_1".pattern = pattern; observe({ type: "drum_step_changed", target: "drum_1", voice: voice, step: step, enabled: enabled, pattern: pattern }); return enabled; }

verbs.name: set_tempo
verbs.source: verb :set_tempo(raw_bpm) rx { let bpm = raw_bpm; if (typeof(raw_bpm) == "string") { let trimmed = str_trim(raw_bpm); bpm = to_int(trimmed); if (bpm == 0 && trimmed != "0") { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "BPM expects digits.", value: raw_bpm }; } } if (typeof(bpm) != "number") { raise { code: "E_TYPE", message: "tempo must be numeric", value: raw_bpm }; } bpm = round(bpm); if (bpm < 60) { bpm = 60; } if (bpm > 200) { bpm = 200; } "drum_1".bpm = bpm; observe({ type: "tempo_changed", target: "drum_1", bpm: bpm }); return bpm; }

verbs.name: start_transport
verbs.source: verb :start_transport() rx { let started = now(); "drum_1".playing = true; "drum_1".started_at = started; observe({ type: "transport_started", target: "drum_1", started_at: started, bpm: "drum_1".bpm }); return started; }

verbs.name: stop_transport
verbs.source: verb :stop_transport() rx { "drum_1".playing = false; observe({ type: "transport_stopped", target: "drum_1" }); return true; }

verbs.name: save_scene
verbs.source: verb :save_scene(name) rx { let scene = "default_scene"; scene.name = name; scene.controls = { slot_1: { loop_id: "slot_1".loop_id, playing: "slot_1".playing, gain: "slot_1".gain, freq: "slot_1".freq }, slot_2: { loop_id: "slot_2".loop_id, playing: "slot_2".playing, gain: "slot_2".gain, freq: "slot_2".freq }, slot_3: { loop_id: "slot_3".loop_id, playing: "slot_3".playing, gain: "slot_3".gain, freq: "slot_3".freq }, slot_4: { loop_id: "slot_4".loop_id, playing: "slot_4".playing, gain: "slot_4".gain, freq: "slot_4".freq }, channel_1: { gain: "channel_1".gain }, filter_1: { cutoff: "filter_1".cutoff }, delay_1: { send: "delay_1".send, time: "delay_1".time, feedback: "delay_1".feedback, wet: "delay_1".wet }, drum_1: { bpm: "drum_1".bpm, playing: "drum_1".playing, started_at: "drum_1".started_at, step_count: "drum_1".step_count, pattern: "drum_1".pattern } }; observe({ type: "scene_saved", scene: scene, name: name }); return scene; }

verbs.name: recall_scene
verbs.source: verb :recall_scene(scene) rx { let controls = scene.controls; let s1 = controls["slot_1"]; "slot_1".loop_id = s1["loop_id"]; "slot_1".playing = s1["playing"]; "slot_1".gain = s1["gain"]; "slot_1".freq = s1["freq"]; let s2 = controls["slot_2"]; "slot_2".loop_id = s2["loop_id"]; "slot_2".playing = s2["playing"]; "slot_2".gain = s2["gain"]; "slot_2".freq = s2["freq"]; let s3 = controls["slot_3"]; "slot_3".loop_id = s3["loop_id"]; "slot_3".playing = s3["playing"]; "slot_3".gain = s3["gain"]; "slot_3".freq = s3["freq"]; let s4 = controls["slot_4"]; "slot_4".loop_id = s4["loop_id"]; "slot_4".playing = s4["playing"]; "slot_4".gain = s4["gain"]; "slot_4".freq = s4["freq"]; let channel = controls["channel_1"]; "channel_1".gain = channel["gain"]; let filter = controls["filter_1"]; "filter_1".cutoff = filter["cutoff"]; let delay = controls["delay_1"]; "delay_1".send = delay["send"]; "delay_1".time = delay["time"]; "delay_1".feedback = delay["feedback"]; "delay_1".wet = delay["wet"]; let drum = controls["drum_1"]; "drum_1".bpm = drum["bpm"]; "drum_1".playing = drum["playing"]; "drum_1".started_at = drum["started_at"]; "drum_1".step_count = drum["step_count"]; "drum_1".pattern = drum["pattern"]; observe({ type: "scene_recalled", scene: scene, controls: controls }); return true; }

seed_hooks.name: Dubspace
seed_hooks.description: The first runnable sound-space instance. It owns the sequenced coordination surface for four loop slots, one channel, one filter, one delay, one percussion loop, and one default scene.

seed_hooks.name: Loop 1
seed_hooks.description: Loop slot 1 in the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and stores loop id, playing state, gain, and oscillator frequency.

seed_hooks.name: Loop 2
seed_hooks.description: Loop slot 2 in the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and stores loop id, playing state, gain, and oscillator frequency.

seed_hooks.name: Loop 3
seed_hooks.description: Loop slot 3 in the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and stores loop id, playing state, gain, and oscillator frequency.

seed_hooks.name: Loop 4
seed_hooks.description: Loop slot 4 in the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and stores loop id, playing state, gain, and oscillator frequency.

seed_hooks.name: Channel
seed_hooks.description: Mixer channel for the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and contributes shared gain state to the current mix.

seed_hooks.name: Filter
seed_hooks.description: Shared filter control for the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and exposes cutoff as a sequenced parameter.

seed_hooks.name: Delay
seed_hooks.description: Shared delay control for the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and stores send, time, feedback, and wet mix values.

seed_hooks.name: Percussion Loop
seed_hooks.description: Eight-step percussion loop for the demo dubspace. It is anchored to the_dubspace and stores tempo, transport state, and a shared pattern.

seed_hooks.name: Default Scene
seed_hooks.description: Initial saved scene for the demo dubspace. It records a named control snapshot and gives scene recall a concrete object to read and rewrite.
